name: Tencent Corporate Reference
description: A Chinese corporate technology portal system inspired by Tencent public pages, with blue trust accents, structured mega-navigation, news streams, business pillars, ESG modules, and investor-grade footers.

en.name: Tencent Corporate Reference
en.description: A Chinese corporate technology portal system inspired by Tencent public pages, with blue trust accents, structured mega-navigation, news streams, business pillars, ESG modules, and investor-grade footers.

zh-CN.name: 腾讯企业参考
zh-CN.description: 受腾讯公开页面启发的中文企业科技门户系统，包含蓝色信任强调、结构化大型导航、新闻流、业务支柱、ESG 模块和投资者级页脚。
